kind: mechanical conformance amendment (pre-ruling; flagged for confirmation in docs/SC-0063-BATCH-RULING-SHEET.md §E-2)

edits.why: The drafter's judgment (YHWH's command at 1:2 lifts to ELDER_AUTHORITY, a legitimate REGISTER member, at moment level) is preserved verbatim; it was written into the wrong KEY — framing_override carries the NARRATIVE_FRAMING axis (closed: COMMUNITY_MEMORY), override_value carries register values. The explicit framing_override:null left behind was dropped (that key's schema has no null branch, unlike genre_override). The drafter's note is intact in fills.json.

prompt_followup: none needed — the override-entry key split is already in fm-drafter prompt §4; tabled as a watch item if it recurs.
